description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa with a modern, boxy silhouette and a low profile. The upholstery features a light, off-white color with a subtle, irregular linear pattern that gives it a textured appearance. The seat consists of a single, thick cushion, while the backrest is also a single, continuous cushion, both appearing firmly attached to the frame. The armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform rectangular outline. The sofa stands on four short, dark legs that are positioned at the corners, providing a slight elevation above the ground. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or tufting, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with light, textured upholstery and straight, wide armrests. It features a single seat and back cushion, elevated on four short, dark legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, single seat and back cushion, and both straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the sofa, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest and the sofa's rectangular shape, with no visible seams or detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the armrest and cushion thickness from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion and single, continuous back cushion, both firmly attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, straight legs positioned at the corners, dark in color, with a simple, exposed block style.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with a single attached cushion and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light, irregular linear pattern giving a textured, woven appearance; no decorative stitching or tufting.
